assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: Branch Operations section shows 'git checkout TC-9005' then 'git pull' as the first step, explicitly stating 'The target branch is TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: PR creation command shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005' with the note: 'The --base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' is specified, with the note: 'The task branch is named after the Jira task issue ID (TC-9205), which is distinct from the target branch (TC-9005).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: Code Inspection section references all 3 files: (1) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs — Inspect this file to understand the existing migration pattern', (2) 'entity/src/advisory.rs — Verify that the advisory entity no longer references the status column', (3) 'migration/src/lib.rs — Inspect to understand how migrations are registered.'

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit command includes '--trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code'' explicitly in the git commit command.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: Commit message is 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' with 'Implements TC-9205' in the footer. Type 'feat', scope 'migration', and TC-9205 reference are all present.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: Target Branch Extraction section states: 'The task description includes a Target Branch section with the value TC-9005. This identifies TC-9005 as the feature branch that this task's PR must target. This is NOT main.'
